conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt a particularly strong bond with J, E, and D, as we all shared deeply personal motivations about providing for our families and explicitly agreed to look out for one another. J and I even made a formal deal to stay focused, while E and D both emphasized mutual trust over seeing others as obstacles. Conversely, I felt the least connected to G, who seemed more guarded and skeptical than the others, resulting in a less certain rapport.

I established verbal agreements to look out for each other with J, D, E, and A, providing a solid foundation of potential allies. I generally trust J and E the most because of our shared values and explicit pacts, whereas I remain cautious of G due to our weaker connection and their more suspicious outlook on the group.
